parameters.query:
SELECT *
FROM public.fn_select_pedido_reutilizable(
  '{{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.telefono }}',
  '{{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.session_id }}',
  '{{ String($('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.pedido_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ ['true', true, '1', 1].includes($('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.forzar_pedido_nuevo) ? 'true' : 'false' }}
)

INSERT INTO pedidos (
  restaurante_id, usuario_id, telefono, session_id, session_started_at, pedido_numero, items, subtotal, total, estado, created_at, updated_at
) VALUES (
  1,
  COALESCE(
    CASE WHEN regexp_replace('{{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').item.json.usuario_id || '' }}', '[^0-9]', '', 'g') <> '' THEN regexp_replace('{{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').item.json.usuario_id || '' }}', '[^0-9]', '', 'g')::int ELSE NULL END,
    (SELECT id FROM usuarios WHERE telefono = '{{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').item.json.telefono }}' LIMIT 1)
  ),
  '{{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').item.json.telefono }}',
  '{{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').item.json.session_id }}',
  NOW(),
  {{ $json.siguiente_numero }},
  '[]'::jsonb, 0, 0, 'en_curso', NOW(), NOW()
) RETURNING *

SELECT
  categoria,
  producto,
  descripcion,
  variante,
  precio,
  extras_disponibles,
  disponible,
  tags,
  is_pizza,
  producto_display AS nombre,
  menu_item_id,
  menu_variant_id,
  extras_json
FROM public.fn_menu_lookup(NULL)
ORDER BY categoria, producto, precio

WITH current_row AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM pedidos
  WHERE id = {{ $input.first().json.pedido_id }}
),
updated AS (
  UPDATE pedidos p
  SET 
    items = '{{ JSON.stringify($input.first().json.items_actualizados || []).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
    subtotal = {{ Number($input.first().json.subtotal || 0) }},
    total = CASE
      WHEN lower(COALESCE(p.tipo_despacho,'')) = 'delivery' THEN {{ Number($input.first().json.subtotal || 0) }} + COALESCE(p.costo_envio,0)
      ELSE {{ Number($input.first().json.subtotal || 0) }}
    END,
    notas = {{ $input.first().json.notas_sql_frag }},
    usuario_id = COALESCE(
      p.usuario_id,
      CASE
        WHEN regexp_replace('{{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.usuario_id || '' }}', '[^0-9]', '', 'g') <> ''
        THEN regexp_replace('{{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.usuario_id || '' }}', '[^0-9]', '', 'g')::int
        ELSE NULL
      END
    ),
    estado = CASE
      WHEN lower(COALESCE(p.estado,'en_curso')) IN ('confirmado','pendiente_pago','pagado','paid') THEN 'en_curso'
      ELSE COALESCE(p.estado,'en_curso')
    END,
    updated_at = NOW()
  WHERE p.id = {{ $input.first().json.pedido_id }}
    AND {{ $input.first().json.mutar_db === true ? 'true' : 'false' }}
  RETURNING p.*
)
SELECT * FROM updated
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM current_row
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM updated)

SELECT EXISTS(
  SELECT 1 FROM pedidos p
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT COALESCE(config_value::int, 60) AS minutos
    FROM restaurante_config
    WHERE config_key = 'cart_expiry_minutes'
      AND restaurante_id = 1
    LIMIT 1
  ) cfg
  WHERE p.telefono = '{{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.telefono }}'
    AND p.estado IN ('en_curso', 'recibido')
    AND p.updated_at < NOW() - (cfg.minutos * INTERVAL '1 minute')
    AND p.updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' 
) AS tenia_carrito_expirado

INSERT INTO public.escalaciones
  (restaurante_id, telefono, problema, contexto, conversation_id, account_id, contact_id, estado)
VALUES (
  1,
  '{{ $input.first().json.telefono.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $input.first().json.problema_escalacion.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{"subflujo": "Apertura", "tipo": "error_sistema"}'::jsonb,
  '', '', '', 'pendiente'
)
